keyFeatures.title: Zero Setup, Instant Start
keyFeatures.description: No installation, no configuration. Just open Remix in your browser and start building smart contracts in seconds.

keyFeatures.title: Everything You Need, Built In
keyFeatures.description: Remix comes packed with tools for writing, testing, debugging, analyzing, deploying, and verifying contracts — all in one place.

keyFeatures.title: Battle-Tested by Millions
keyFeatures.description: Remix has been used to deploy over 12 million contracts and educate thousands of developers through hackathons, bootcamps, and tutorials.

keyFeatures.title: Remix Desktop
keyFeatures.description: Works anywhere, even offline. Native terminals. Great for larger projects and enhanced security. Live sync with any Editor and Remix for Web3 tools.

ai.title: Build Smarter with RemixAI
ai.description: Compiler errors explained and fixed, AI code generation/completion, and AI code requests using the LLMs you already depend on.

features.label: Explain
features.description: Understand errors and code behavior instantly.

features.label: Generate
features.description: Create smart contracts from natural language.

learning.title: Master the Fundamentals of Web3
learning.description: Remix's graphic and intuitive UI makes it THE gateway to smart contract building and Web3 security. Whether you're a hands-on learner, advanced student, or educator, our interactive LearnEth environment and AI agent are your guide.

checklist.label: Learn Solidity, Vyper, Noir, and More!

workflow.title: Prototype, Iterate, Refine
workflow.description: Move fast from concept to product with Remix's intuitive and powerful suite of tools.

features.title: Integrated Visual Debugger
features.description: Step through transactions line by line. Inspect state, storage, and events at every point in execution.

features.title: Git for Collaborative Workflows
features.description: Review PRs, share links, and co-edit with teammates. Remix AI helps speed up your feedback loops.

features.title: Extensive Contracts Library
features.description: Jump-start with OpenZeppelin templates, ERC standards, and community-contributed examples.

advanced.title: Advanced Features in Remix
advanced.description: From automation with scripts to compiling ZKProofs, Remix has a huge arsenal of features for advanced Web3 developers.

plugins.name: Stylus (Arbitrum)
plugins.description: Write EVM contracts in Rust / C++
